# Backdrop Replacement Banner             ![](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/Slider-Banner-Stand-10-x-8-Graphic-Only-4PP_1.jpg)

Do you need to update the content on your Backdrop Banner? Get started on your replacement for your Backdrop Banner below. You can customize it for any occasion or location. We have lots of templates available for you to use. You can edit the banner template in the online designer by adding clip art, photos, text, and a background.

*   [Create your Product](#cust)

_Click on a template to customize your product_

### Backdrop Replacement Banner Description

This large banner frame (Slider) is a great alternative to standard pop up backwall displays. The Slider frame can adjust from an 81" to 120" width & 41.5" to 96" height display. Pole pockets are sewn on top and bottom of the fabric print. The frame is constructed out of 1.5" telescopic poles that slide, allowing multiple graphic sizes to be used on the display.

**Material:** 9 oz. Stretch Fabric Material  
  
**Frame Color:** Black  
  
 

### Package Includes:

 

*   (1) Single Sided Graphic
*   (2) 4 1/2" Pole Pockets (Top and Bottom)
*   (1) Large Slider Frame
*   (1) Black Nylon Carry Bag

  
Warranty: 1 Year on Graphic and Frame

  
Other Features:

*   _Display Size:_ 96"W x 96"H
*   _Graphic Size:_ 96"W x 94"H
*   _Shipping Size:_ 41" x 5" x 4"
*   _Banner Materials:_ Stretch Fabric, Dye-Sublimation
*   _Weight:_ 16 lbs

[Create Your Product](#cust)

### Three Ways to Order Replacements Material

There are three ways you can order vinyl replacements online. 

1.  Pick a Template to Customize
    *   Add a background, clipart images, text or upload your own graphics
2.  Upload a File
    *   [Click here](https://www.banners.com/artwork-specs) for the complete artwork specifications page
3.  Let us Design
    *   We have a team of graphic designers who can design a custom vinyl replacement for you. Upload any artwork you want on your banner and provide instructions for us

### Payment Information

All vinyl banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express and Discover cards. We also accept checks. Checks must be received before your order is put into production. [For more information on check orders, see our blog.](https://banners-com.blogspot.com/2013/05/online-orders-we-now-accept-checks.html) If you have a purchase order, please contact a customer service representative for your options.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your proof for your order.

Please note we have a minimum order of $35.00 in product.

[Create Your Product](#cust)

### Shipping Information

Please specify which shipping method you would like when you place your order. We offer a 1-3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States. [Click here](https://www.banners.com/shipping-info) for more information about our standard and oversized vinyl banner shipping times. If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service prior to ordering. Phone: 320-391-5300

We offer the following shipping methods:

*   Economy (5-10 Business Days)
*   Standard (3-5 Business Days)
*   Three Day (3 Business Days)
*   Two Day (2 Business Days)
*   Overnight (1 Business Day)
*   Freight

Shipping prices are determined by the weight of the package and the destination. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders and over-sized packages. Please note, due to UPS shipping restrictions, banners that exceed 8' in both directions will generally be folded for shipping (billboards, large backdrops etc.)

If you are located outside of the Continental United States, please contact us for a shipping quote.

**You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.**

After products have shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if any shipping company has a delay in your package. We recommend ordering your banners early.

Delays because of Acts of God or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7-10 business days after initial scheduled delivery.

Please order your banners early as we cannot control delivery after your product leaves our production facilities.

**Banners.com ships throughout the United States and Internationally. Please note: all international shipments must have shipping labels provided by the customers. Contact a customer service rep today for more information.**

**Economy Shipping**

If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

[Create Your Product](#cust)

### Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

#### 5 Business Days Saver:

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

![5 Business Day Saver](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-5 Business Days Saver.jpg)

*   Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### **7 Business Days Saver:**

If you aren't in a hurry, you can save some money by choosing our 7 Day Saver option.

![7 Business Day Saver](https://lh5.googleusercontent.com/LcK53XJTeqTYkMk1zUJA9PAldo0sYW38EdL2-WLQKJQLIngbPbsGo3ElM1K1nGUba1VdOlIKWQbVMzXOkT2nXt3u8ruuyBFkk_GXxv7AuuyQ0zbT6kBhwimCXJtQy42OCd9GbqPwfhtl45P34XFt0_E)

*   **Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,**
    
*   **Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,**
    
*   **Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.**
    
*   **Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.**
    

[Create Your Product](#cust)

#### Upload a Print Ready File

Please upload your 60 MB or smaller print ready file. Acceptable file formats include: .eps, .pdf, or high resolution .tiff or .jpg. Typically 300 dpi or higher resolution files work best.

**For files larger than 60 MB please call for instructions to insure the fastest service.**

## Why Choose Banners.com?

**Customer Service**

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

**Fast Turnaround**

Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

**Quality Products**

Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

**Live Order Tracking**

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
